## Merge governance

> **Only the merge approver (senior/lead engineer) merges this PR to `main`.**
> See [`docs/pr-merge-governance.md`](../docs/pr-merge-governance.md).

- [ ] CI green on this PR

**Implementing agent:** do not merge. **Reviewer agent:** post findings only; do not merge.
